overall.description: A cinematic slow pan through a futuristic cyberpunk bedroom from Cyberpunk 2077, showcasing neon-lit architecture, modern furniture, and atmospheric lighting effects typical of high-end game engine rendering.

segments.scene_description: The camera slowly pans left across a cyberpunk-style bedroom, revealing a bed with an illuminated neon archway headboard, decorative glass vases on a foreground table, and modern lamps on the left side. The room features atmospheric lighting with cyan neon accents and warm lamp light, showcasing the high-fidelity interior design of a futuristic residential space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a slow, sweeping camera movement that reveals the intricate details of a high-fidelity cyberpunk bedroom. It begins by gliding across the foreground, passing decorative glass vases on a table as the perspective shifts. As the camera continues its leftward pan, the view expands to showcase modern lamps and the atmospheric interplay between warm ambient light and sharp cyan neon accents. The movement finally settles on a futuristic bed, framed by a striking illuminated neon archway headboard that anchors the residential space.
